welcome_message: Discover the world's most captivating artworks and historical artifacts. Use our innovative AI-powered scanner to identify pieces, delve into rich contextual information, and explore their stories on a global map.
error_identifying_artwork: Could not identify the artwork. Please try another image.
error_api_not_loaded: Map service API not loaded. Please check your network connection and try again.
error_api_timeout: Map service API failed to load after timeout. Please check your network connection.
no_ai_insight_available: No AI insight available for this artifact.
no_ai_recommendations_available: No AI recommendations available at this time.
error_ai_quota_exceeded_with_link: You've exceeded your AI quota. Please check your rate limits documentation, ensure your API key is correctly configured, and that billing is enabled for your Google Cloud project to access full features.
fill_all_required_fields: Please fill in all required fields (Name, Artist, Year, Description, Image, Location, Category, Materials, Dimensions, Museum).
no_artifacts_found: No artifacts found. Add some above!
confirm_remove_artifact: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}"?
image_url_label: Image URL (fallback if no file uploaded)
failed_to_generate_audio: Failed to generate audio or received no audio data.
privacy_banner_message: We use anonymized analytics to improve your experience and understand visitor engagement. This data is not personally identifiable. By continuing, you agree to our privacy policy.
geolocation_not_supported_error: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
geolocation_permission_denied_error: Geolocation permission denied. Please enable location services in your browser settings.
geolocation_position_unavailable_error: Location information is unavailable. Please try again later.
geolocation_timeout_error: The request to get user location timed out.
geolocation_reverse_geocode_failed: Failed to get city/country from coordinates using map service. Please enter manually.
geolocation_reverse_geocode_failed_netwo: Failed to connect to map service for city/country detection. Please check your network or enter manually.
geolocation_city_country_manual_message: City and Country might need to be entered manually.
error_unidentifiable_object: Could not identify a clear art piece or artifact in the image. Please try again with a clearer image.
error_camera_access_denied: Camera access denied. Please enable camera permissions in your browser settings.
error_camera_setup_failed: Camera setup failed. Please try again.
identification_prompt_prefix: Your task is to determine if the image depicts any of the following artworks from our curated collection.
